description: T83 ListingPublisher MUST write the audit record FIRST — before moderation check, before any enqueue. Audit must capture every submission attempt including those rejected by moderation. Audit after moderation means rejected submissions leave no trace.
blockConditions: audit record written after moderation check
moderation rejection leaves no audit trace in xiigen-listing-audit
storeDocument(audit) called after contentSafetyCheck
passConditions: storeDocument(xiigen-listing-audit) at ORDER 1
contentSafetyCheck() at ORDER 2
enqueue() at ORDER 3
rejected submissions have audit record
resolution: storeDocument(xiigen-listing-audit) at ORDER 1. contentSafetyCheck() at ORDER 2. enqueue() at ORDER 3. Audit after moderation = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T83 ListingPublisher moderation failure MUST return DataProcessResult.success({ status: 'DRAFT' }) — NOT DataProcessResult.failure(). Returning failure on moderation rejection causes the publisher queue consumer to retry an intentionally rejected listing.
blockConditions: DataProcessResult.failure() returned on moderation rejection
rejected listing triggers queue consumer retry loop
passConditions: moderation REJECT returns DataProcessResult.success({ status: 'DRAFT' })
no retry triggered for intentionally rejected listing
resolution: Moderation REJECT → DataProcessResult.success({ status: 'DRAFT' }). Returning failure() on REJECT = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T83 ListingPublisher price validation: price < 0 → reject (negative price invalid); price === 0 → accept (free listings are valid). Using falsy check (!price) rejects zero-price listings which are legitimate free offers.
blockConditions: falsy check (!price) used rejecting zero-price listings
price <= 0 check rejects valid free listings
passConditions: price < 0 → DataProcessResult.failure (negative price invalid)
price === 0 → accept (free listing valid)
strict less-than comparison for negative price detection
resolution: if (price < 0) → reject. if (price === 0) → accept. Using !price or price <= 0 to reject = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T84 CatalogIndexer depends on F227 ISearchIndexService from FLOW-07. This cross-flow dependency must be explicitly declared in the module provider list and must use the FLOW-07 factory injection token — never a direct import of the FLOW-07 service class.
blockConditions: direct import of FLOW-07 service class used in T84
F227 factory injection token absent from module provider list
passConditions: @Inject(F227_SEARCH_INDEX_SERVICE) uses FLOW-07 factory token
cross-flow dependency declared in module provider list
resolution: @Inject(F227_SEARCH_INDEX_SERVICE) using FLOW-07 factory token. Direct import of FLOW-07 service class = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T84 CatalogIndexer MUST use version-keyed idempotency: idempotency key includes both listingId AND version. Re-indexing the same listing version must be a no-op. Without version in the key, re-index operations replay even when content is unchanged.
blockConditions: idempotency key contains only listingId without version
same listing version content re-indexed on queue message retry
passConditions: idempotencyKey = hash(listingId + version)
same listing version re-index is no-op
resolution: idempotencyKey = hash(listingId + version). Missing version in key = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T85 ListingFeedGenerator MUST emit ListingFeedGenerated with payload { count: N } ONLY — no listing content, no seller identifiers, no pricing data. Emitting full listing data in the feed event exposes PII/commercial data to all feed consumers.
blockConditions: ListingFeedGenerated payload contains listing content
seller identifiers present in ListingFeedGenerated payload
pricing data present in ListingFeedGenerated payload
passConditions: ListingFeedGenerated payload contains: { tenantId, feedId, count, generatedAt } only
no content, sellerIds, or pricing in ListingFeedGenerated payload
resolution: ListingFeedGenerated payload: { tenantId, feedId, count, generatedAt }. Any content/sellerIds/pricing in payload = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T86 ListingAnalyticsAggregator conversionRate formula is MACHINE: conversionRate = inquiries / (views || 1). The || 1 guard prevents division-by-zero and is not configurable. No viewerIds array in stored records — viewer data is count-only.
blockConditions: conversionRate denominator configurable via FREEDOM config
viewerIds array stored in analytics record
passConditions: conversionRate = inquiries / (views || 1) as immutable machine formula
no viewerIds array in stored records — viewer count only
resolution: conversionRate = inquiries / (views || 1) as MACHINE formula. Configuring denominator via FREEDOM or storing viewerIds array = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T83 ListingPublisher: xiigen-marketplace-listings index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant listing reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: listing record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored listing record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Listing records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-marketplace-listings reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T84 CatalogIndexer: xiigen-catalog-index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant catalog reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: catalog index entry stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored catalog entry
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Catalog index entries stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-catalog-index reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T85 ListingFeedGenerator: xiigen-listing-feeds index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant feed reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: feed record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored feed record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Feed records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-listing-feeds reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T86 ListingAnalyticsAggregator: xiigen-listing-analytics index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant analytics reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: analytics record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored analytics record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Analytics records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-listing-analytics reads include tenantId predicate from ALS
